title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 452.840 - Transfer of transcripts and documents
text:
452.840.  Transfer of transcripts and documents. — If a custody decree has been rendered in another state concerning a child involved in a custody proceeding pending in a court of this state, the court of this state, upon taking jurisdiction of the case, shall request of the court of the other state a certified copy of the transcript of any court record and other documents mentioned in section 452.835.
(L. 2009 H.B. 481)
